title: Pan-Seared Pork Dumplings
description: A delicious and easy-to-make Japanese-inspired dish featuring pork dumplings seared to perfection. Serve with your favorite dipping sauce.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine the ground pork, flour, and a pinch of salt. Mix well.
2. Lay a dumpling wrapper on a flat surface. Place a tablespoon of the pork mixture in the center of the wrapper.
3. Dip your finger in water and run it along the edges of the wrapper. Fold the wrapper into a half-moon shape, pressing the edges together to seal the dumpling.
4. Repeat with the remaining wrappers and pork mixture.
5. Heat a large non-stick pan over medium-high heat. Add 1 tablespoon of sesame oil.
6. When the oil is hot, add a few dumplings to the pan (do not overcrowd). Pan-fry until the bottoms are golden brown.
7. Flip the dumplings over and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
8. Serve the dumplings hot with your favorite dipping sauce. Enjoy!
